consent_description: Please review and accept the following documents to continue using TrustyDr.
consent_checkbox: I have read and agree to the Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, and Legal Disclaimer.

about.title: About Us
about.p1: TrustyDr helps patients find trusted and verified doctors. Patients can view doctor profiles, read reviews from other patients, and choose doctors with confidence based on real experiences.
about.p2: In Iraq, finding a doctor often requires searching for phone numbers and making multiple calls, sometimes only to find that the doctor is unavailable or traveling. TrustyDr solves this by providing clear doctor information and real-time availability in one place.
about.p3: Patients no longer need to arrive early and wait for hours at clinics. With TrustyDr, you can view a doctor’s schedule, book a specific time, and arrive when it’s your turn — saving time and reducing unnecessary waiting.
about.p4: TrustyDr allows patients to add their medical conditions, history, and important health information. Doctors can review this information before the visit, helping them understand the patient better and provide more accurate care.

help.title: Help & Support
help.p1: If you need help using TrustyDr or have questions about appointments, doctors, or features, our support team is here to assist you.
help.p2: You can contact us anytime by email at support@trustydr.com and our team will respond as soon as possible.
help.p3: We value your feedback. If you have suggestions or ideas to improve TrustyDr, please share them with us. Your input helps us make the app better for everyone.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.p1: TrustyDr respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal and medical information. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your data.
privacy.p2: We may collect information such as your name, contact details, medical history, and appointment data to provide better healthcare services and improve your experience.
privacy.p3: Your medical information is shared only with the doctors you choose and only for the purpose of providing medical care. We do not sell or share your data with third parties for marketing.
privacy.p4: TrustyDr uses technical and organizational security measures to protect your data from unauthorized access, loss, or misuse.
privacy.p5: If you have any questions or concerns about your privacy, you can contact us at support@trustydr.com.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.p1: By using TrustyDr, you agree to comply with these Terms and Conditions. Please read them carefully before using the application.
terms.p2: Users are responsible for providing accurate and up-to-date personal and medical information. TrustyDr is not responsible for issues caused by incorrect information.
terms.p3: TrustyDr is a platform that helps patients connect with doctors. It does not provide medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment directly.
terms.p4: Appointment availability and schedules are managed by doctors. TrustyDr is not responsible for cancellations, delays, or changes made by healthcare providers.
terms.p5: TrustyDr reserves the right to update these Terms and Conditions at any time. Continued use of the app means you accept the updated terms.

legal.title: Legal & Medical Disclaimer
legal.p1: TrustyDr is a technology platform designed to help patients find and connect with independent healthcare providers. TrustyDr does not provide medical care or healthcare services.
legal.p2: All doctors listed on TrustyDr are independent professionals. Medical advice, diagnosis, and treatment are provided solely by the doctor, not by TrustyDr.
legal.p3: TrustyDr is not intended for medical emergencies. In case of an emergency, please contact local emergency services or visit the nearest hospital immediately.
legal.p4: TrustyDr does not guarantee medical outcomes, treatment results, or the availability of any healthcare provider at a specific time.
legal.p5: By using TrustyDr, you agree that TrustyDr is not liable for medical decisions, treatments, or outcomes provided by healthcare professionals.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: TrustyDr helps patients find doctors, view their availability, and book appointments easily without the need for phone calls.
faq.a2: Doctors on TrustyDr provide professional information and are reviewed by patients. Verification processes may vary by location and specialty.
faq.q3: Can I choose a specific appointment time?
faq.a3: Yes, you can view available schedules and book a specific time that works best for you.
faq.a4: TrustyDr is free for patients to browse doctors and book appointments. Some services may be managed directly by doctors.
faq.a5: Yes. TrustyDr takes data privacy seriously and shares your medical information only with doctors you choose.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.p1: If you need assistance or have questions about TrustyDr, you can contact us by email at support@trustydr.com.
contact.p2: Our support team is available to help you with technical issues, account questions, or general inquiries.
contact.p3: We welcome your feedback and suggestions. Your input helps us improve TrustyDr and provide a better experience for everyone.

home.no_notifications_message: Find a trusted doctor today and book your appointment in minutes.
